name: halliday-payments
description: Halliday Payments integration for crypto deposits, fiat-to-crypto onramps, and cross-chain swaps.

interface.longDescription: Halliday Payments helps developers add crypto deposits, fiat-to-crypto onramps, and cross-chain swaps with bundled SDK, API, example repository, compliance, and payment lookup guidance.
defaultPrompt: How do I add the Halliday SDK widget to my app?
Look up a Halliday payment by ID.
